events.text: Adam and Johan grew up in the same house.
Years earlier, Karl had carried Adam through the rain.
Margaret remembered her mother in Jakarta.
Meanwhile, Karl traveled alone across the island.
Adam searched for Margaret after the storm.
Margaret found Adam at the doorway.

segments.text: Adam and Johan grew up in the same house.
Years earlier, Karl had carried Adam through the rain.
Margaret remembered her mother in Jakarta.
Meanwhile, Karl traveled alone across the island.
Adam searched for Margaret after the storm. Margaret found Adam at the doorway.

xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<TYM>
  <TA-SECTION>
    <TA ID="A0" NAME="Narrator" />
    <TA ID="A1" NAME="Adam" />
    <TA ID="A2" NAME="Johan" />
    <TA ID="A3" NAME="Karl" />
    <TA ID="A4" NAME="Margaret" />
  </TA-SECTION>
  <TL-SECTION>
    <TL ID="L1" NAME="unknown" PARENTID="" />
    <TL ID="L2" NAME="the same house" PARENTID="" />
    <TL ID="L3" NAME="Jakarta" PARENTID="" />
    <TL ID="L4" NAME="the doorway" PARENTID="" />
  </TL-SECTION>
  <EVENT-SECTION>
    <EVENT ID="EV1" SPANS="0~41" ACTORS="A1,A2" LOCATION="L2" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="" TENSE="Past" ACTION="grew" ORDER="1" TEXT="Adam and Johan grew up in the same house." />
    <EVENT ID="EV2" SPANS="42~96" ACTORS="A3,A1" LOCATION="L1" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="Years earlier" TENSE="Past" ACTION="had" ORDER="2" TEXT="Years earlier, Karl had carried Adam through the rain." />
    <EVENT ID="EV3" SPANS="97~139" ACTORS="A4" LOCATION="L3" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="Years earlier" TENSE="Past" ACTION="remembered" ORDER="3" TEXT="Margaret remembered her mother in Jakarta." />
    <EVENT ID="EV4" SPANS="140~189" ACTORS="A3" LOCATION="L1" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="Years earlier" TENSE="Past" ACTION="traveled" ORDER="4" TEXT="Meanwhile, Karl traveled alone across the island." />
    <EVENT ID="EV5" SPANS="190~233" ACTORS="A1,A4" LOCATION="L1" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="after the storm" TENSE="Past" ACTION="searched" ORDER="5" TEXT="Adam searched for Margaret after the storm." />
    <EVENT ID="EV6" SPANS="234~269" ACTORS="A4,A1" LOCATION="L4" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="after the storm" TENSE="Past" ACTION="found" ORDER="6" TEXT="Margaret found Adam at the doorway." />
    <EVENT ID="EV7" SPANS="270~299" ACTORS="A1" LOCATION="L1" TEMPORAL-ANCHOR="before dawn" TENSE="Past" ACTION="disappeared" ORDER="7" TEXT="Adam disappeared before dawn." />
  </EVENT-SECTION>
  <TT-SECTION>
    <TT ID="TT1" NAME="Adam&Johan" LEFT-EP="START" RIGHT-EP="STOP" />
    <TT ID="TT2" NAME="Karl&Adam" LEFT-EP="START" RIGHT-EP="STOP" />
    <TT ID="TT3" NAME="Margaret" LEFT-EP="START" RIGHT-EP="EP1" />
    <TT ID="TT4" NAME="Karl" LEFT-EP="EP1" RIGHT-EP="EP2" />
    <TT ID="TT5" NAME="Adam&Margaret" LEFT-EP="EP2" RIGHT-EP="EP3" />
    <TT ID="TT6" NAME="Adam" LEFT-EP="EP3" RIGHT-EP="STOP" />
  </TT-SECTION>
  <TIME-SECTION>
    <TREL ID="TI1" FROM="TS1" REL="IMMEDIATELY-BEFORE" TO="TS2" />
    <TIME ID="TI2" FROM="TT1" REL="BEFORE" TO="TT2" />
    <TREL ID="TI3" FROM="TS2" REL="IMMEDIATELY-BEFORE" TO="TS3" />
    <TIME ID="TI4" FROM="TT2" REL="BEFORE" TO="TT3" />
    <TREL ID="TI5" FROM="TS3" REL="IMMEDIATELY-BEFORE" TO="TS4" />
    <TIME ID="TI6" FROM="TT3" REL="SIMULTANEOUS" TO="TT4" />
    <TREL ID="TI7" FROM="TS4" REL="IMMEDIATELY-BEFORE" TO="TS5" />
    <TIME ID="TI8" FROM="TT4" REL="BEFORE" TO="TT5" />
    <TREL ID="TI9" FROM="TS5" REL="IMMEDIATELY-BEFORE" TO="TS6" />
    <TIME ID="TI10" FROM="TT5" REL="BEFORE" TO="TT6" />
  </TIME-SECTION>
  <EP-SECTION>
    <ENDPOINT ID="EP1" TYPE="SPLIT" NAME="Karl split" TT1="TT3" TT2="TT4" SEGMENT="TS4" />
    <ENDPOINT ID="EP2" TYPE="JOIN" NAME="Karl+Adam&Margaret" TT1="TT4" TT2="TT5" SEGMENT="TS5" />
    <ENDPOINT ID="EP3" TYPE="SPLIT" NAME="Adam split" TT1="TT5" TT2="TT6" SEGMENT="TS6" />
  </EP-SECTION>
  <POINT-SECTION>
    <POINT ID="B1" TYPE="START" FROM-TS="" TO-TS="TS1" TRACKS="TT1" REASON="First TS in text order." />
    <POINT ID="B2" TYPE="RUPTURE" FROM-TS="TS1" TO-TS="TS2" TRACKS="TT1 TT2" REASON="Adjacent text segments belong to different time tracks." />
    <POINT ID="B3" TYPE="RUPTURE" FROM-TS="TS2" TO-TS="TS3" TRACKS="TT2 TT3" REASON="Adjacent text segments belong to different time tracks." />
    <POINT ID="B4" TYPE="RUPTURE" FROM-TS="TS3" TO-TS="TS4" TRACKS="TT3 TT4" REASON="Adjacent text segments belong to different time tracks." />
    <POINT ID="B5" TYPE="SPLIT" FROM-TS="TS3" TO-TS="TS4" TRACKS="TT3 TT4" REASON="Text indicates separation, disappearance, or an actor continuing alone." />
    <POINT ID="B6" TYPE="RUPTURE" FROM-TS="TS4" TO-TS="TS5" TRACKS="TT4 TT5" REASON="Adjacent text segments belong to different time tracks." />
    <POINT ID="B7" TYPE="JOIN" FROM-TS="TS4" TO-TS="TS5" TRACKS="TT4 TT5" REASON="Text indicates that separate developments meet and continue together." />
    <POINT ID="B8" TYPE="RUPTURE" FROM-TS="TS5" TO-TS="TS6" TRACKS="TT5 TT6" REASON="Adjacent text segments belong to different time tracks." />
    <POINT ID="B9" TYPE="SPLIT" FROM-TS="TS5" TO-TS="TS6" TRACKS="TT5 TT6" REASON="Text indicates separation, disappearance, or an actor continuing alone." />
    <POINT ID="B10" TYPE="STOP" FROM-TS="TS6" TO-TS="" TRACKS="TT6" REASON="Last TS in text order." />
  </POINT-SECTION>
  <BODY>
    <TS ID="TS1" IN-TT="TT1" SPANS="0~41" ACTORS="A1,A2" LOCATION="L2" NAME="TS1" TYPE="NAR" TST="Past" TIME="" PER="narrator" EVENTS="EV1">Adam and Johan grew up in the same house.</TS>
    <TS ID="TS2" IN-TT="TT2" SPANS="42~96" ACTORS="A3,A1" LOCATION="L1" NAME="TS2" TYPE="REM" TST="Past" TIME="Years earlier" PER="Karl" EVENTS="EV2">Years earlier, Karl had carried Adam through the rain.</TS>
    <TS ID="TS3" IN-TT="TT3" SPANS="97~139" ACTORS="A4" LOCATION="L3" NAME="TS3" TYPE="REM" TST="Past" TIME="Years earlier" PER="Margaret" EVENTS="EV3">Margaret remembered her mother in Jakarta.</TS>
    <TS ID="TS4" IN-TT="TT4" SPANS="140~189" ACTORS="A3" LOCATION="L1" NAME="TS4" TYPE="NAR" TST="Past" TIME="Years earlier" PER="narrator" EVENTS="EV4">Meanwhile, Karl traveled alone across the island.</TS>
    <TS ID="TS5" IN-TT="TT5" SPANS="190~269" ACTORS="A1,A4" LOCATION="L4" NAME="TS5" TYPE="NAR" TST="Past" TIME="after the storm" PER="narrator" EVENTS="EV5,EV6">Adam searched for Margaret after the storm. Margaret found Adam at the doorway.</TS>
    <TS ID="TS6" IN-TT="TT6" SPANS="270~299" ACTORS="A1" LOCATION="L1" NAME="TS6" TYPE="NAR" TST="Past" TIME="before dawn" PER="narrator" EVENTS="EV7">Adam disappeared before dawn.</TS>
  </BODY>
</TYM>
warnings: Time segment types follow the paper labels: NAR, REM, SUP, GEN, and FIC.
The XML output follows the paper notation: TT-SECTION, TIME-SECTION, EP-SECTION, and inline TS tags.
ML.NET calculates event temporal category and TS type from bundled paper-guided seed examples; replace these with an annotated corpus for production use.
